stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 14, a runway is defined as...

options.a: A rectangular area on land or water for landing and take-off.
options.b: A rectangular area on land prepared for landing and take-off of aeroplanes.
options.c: A round area prepared for landing and take-off.
options.d: A rectangular area on a land aerodrome for landing and take-off of aircraft.
